description_long: This is a full-sized pickup truck with a four-door cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The body features a combination of black and gray panels, with the front hood, roof, and rear cargo area in gray, while the doors and side panels are black. The truck has prominent wheel arches, large tires with visible rims, and a robust front grille with integrated headlights. The windows are dark, suggesting tinted glass, and the side mirrors are mounted on the front doors. The rear of the truck includes a tailgate and rear lights, typical of modern pickup designs. The overall build is sturdy, with a high ground clearance and a utilitarian yet contemporary appearance.
description: A large, four-door pickup truck with a black and gray exterior, open cargo bed, and robust build. Features include large wheels, tinted windows, and a prominent front grille.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights, with the truck's black and gray color scheme visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the four-door cab, large wheels, and the length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, and the truck's elevated stance.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view showing both the grille and the side doors, emphasizing the truck's robust build and color contrast.
